name_cn:
'Burberry'
🔥 🔥Vintage plaid mixed leather wallet, comes with a chain leather shoulder strap. Can be used as a small handbag on its own, or as a wallet inside a daily bag. 👍 Counter quality, fine workmanship 💋 Real photos 📷, 8687 Black/Plaid, Size 21cm*12cm*3cm !
